title: Privacy scrub — strip god mode + personal foam references from public surface
current_state: ABOUT.md listed god mode alongside root/normie/research in capability table and phase history; mentioned Foam graph view (personal vault tool). docs/STATUS.md (auto-generated) included test_god_*.py file names in passing-tests list. Together these revealed the existence of the private god mode in the public repo.
target_state: ABOUT.md mentions only root/normie/research; vault description drops Foam reference. verify.py filters out any test name containing 'god' from STATUS.md output. Four test files renamed test_god_*.py to test_priv_*.py so even a grep of the public repo finds nothing.
fix_summary: ABOUT.md: removed 'god' from mode list (line 33), removed Foam graph view (line 73), removed 'god isolation' from Phase 8.5 description (line 86)
scripts/verify.py: added _PRIVATE = ('god',) filter so any test name containing 'god' is excluded from the run/skipped lists in STATUS.md
